privileged_info_summary: The task involves reopening a complaint case in ArkCase. The case has the title 'Public Records Request - Historical Budget Data' and is initially closed. The agent must change the case status from CLOSED to an active status (e.g., ACTIVE, IN_REVIEW, or DRAFT) and add a specific note containing the keywords: general counsel, appeal, reopened, 2025-01-15, and expanded scope. The note must convey that the case was reopened per General Counsel directive following an appeal received on 2025-01-15 with additional records identified requiring re-processing under expanded scope. The case itself is synthetically generated during task setup via the ArkCase REST API.
